title: 皐月賞の後に・臥薪嘗胆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Crown slips from Symboli Rudolf's
grasp, but that only emboldens her to make a
better showing in the Japanese Derby. Her spirit
is far from broken.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Air Groove and the general
manager visit the waiting room, where Symboli
Rudolf waxes lyrical about her dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Moved, the general manager decides to remain in
the student council, but Air Groove seems
displeased with Rudolf's handling of the situation.
